items.title: US launches more strikes on Iran with blasts reported in south of country
items.summary: Trump says the attacks are "retribution for yesterday's bombing of ships by Iran". Iran earlier promised strong retaliation.

items.title: US strikes target Iranian military boats
items.summary: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Ukraine to get licence to produce Patriot missiles, Trump says
items.summary: Although the Patriots are highly effective against Russia's ballistic missiles, they also have lengthy production times.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.summary: • Fox-Dominion trial delay 'is not unusual,' judge says • Fox News' defamation battle isn't stopping Trump's election lies

items.title: 美伊又互轟 川普：停火結束了
items.summary: 〔編譯管淑平／綜合報導〕由於伊朗攻擊荷姆茲海峽三艘商船，引燃美軍與德黑蘭八日新一波相互攻擊，美軍空襲伊朗八十多個目標，伊朗對巴林和科威特的美軍據點進行報復攻擊。正在土耳其出席北大西洋公約組織（NATO）峰會的美國總統川普隨即表示，美伊停火「結束了」，更揚言美國正準備對伊朗發動更多打擊，「我會給一點警…

items.title: 芬蘭總統：烏克蘭已贏得對俄戰爭
items.summary: 〔編譯盧永山／綜合報導〕芬蘭總統史塔布（Alexander Stubb）七日在土耳其首都安卡拉舉行的北大西洋公約組織（NATO）領袖峰會場邊，接受美國財經媒體CNBC訪問表示，烏克蘭已經贏得對俄戰爭，但基輔仍然迫切需要北約盟國提供更多防空支持。 籲北約盟國供烏更多防空系統 史塔布強調，儘管莫斯科…

items.title: 美軍復名太平洋司令部 專家：焦點轉向第一島鏈
items.summary: 〔國際新聞中心／綜合報導〕五角大廈上月宣布，將美國印太司令部（USINDOPACOM）恢復一九四七年的舊稱「太平洋司令部」（USPACOM）。華府智庫昆西研究所（Quincy Institute）全球南方計畫主任席朵爾（Sarang Shidore）撰文指出，此舉象徵美國亞洲戰略重心的重大轉移，顯示…
